info.title: eAutoseller DMS API
info.description:
Documentation to connect to the new DMS API services of ITKrebs GmbH & Co. KG

Please note
At least the APIKey and the ClientSecret are required for authentication, all other required information are documented for the responding endpoints. If you don't have yet authentication data, please contact support@eautoseller.de.

videoUrl.description: The url for a video of the vehicle

warranty.description: The warranty information of the vehicle

rentable.description: Whether the vehicle can be rented or not

preCarriage.description: Whether the vehicle is in pre carriage or not

nstCode.description: The MB national sales type code

promoCode.description: The promotion code for the vehicle

commision.description: The commision number of the vehicle

note.description: A note from the DMS for the vehicle. This note is not published

dailyTip.description: Publish the vehicle as daily tip

path.description: The path for the attribute which has errors

systemId.name: system-id
systemId.description: The id of the system/application (self generated string for the API calls, please use always the same id for calls). This id is displayed to user which caller made the last changes

Forbidden.description: Forbidden, the requested resource cannot be operated by the supplied user

Unauthorized.description: Unauthorized, please check the API Key and the Client Key or request valid ones
